_mode: la_sprawl: seed-res lightmap -> streamed probe seed; adaptive brick probes.
_probes: offline probe_bake: 64m coarse bricks, 2 levels (~7m probe spacing near geometry; per-chunk probe streaming will let this densify later).
_cadence: 57.9k probes / 24 groups every 3 frames ~= 800 probe-traces per frame-equivalent -- the hall's budget (1.7k/2). Full refresh ~1.2s: fine for a static sun.
